title: penstemon pratensis
intro: Penstemon pratensis, also known as the meadow penstemon, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Penstemon pratensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
